Physicians and suppliers are not required to take assignment of Medicare benefits unless
they are enrolled in the Medicare Participating Physician and Supplier Program or, in
the case of physician services, the Medicare beneficiary is also a recipient of State
medical assistance (Medicaid) or the service is otherwise subject to mandatory
